documents.text: Company RAG Policy (2024). All customer data must be encrypted at rest and in transit. Access to production retrieval indices requires SSO and MFA. Embeddings are computed using approved third-party APIs; no PII may be included in evaluation logs without redaction.

Architecture note: Hybrid retrieval combines BM25 lexical scoring with dense embeddings. Score fusion uses a configurable alpha to balance precision (sparse) and semantic recall (dense). Reranking is optional and should be gated behind feature flags due to latency and cost.

Operations: When confidence scores fall below the configured threshold, the system must return an insufficient-information response or a clarifying question instead of a speculative answer. All query traces must include retrieved chunk identifiers for audit.
